page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m4.xlarge is an entry-level general-purpose virtual server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with an Intel Xeon processor running at 2.5 GHz, providing 4 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core. The system is configured with 16 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. This instance does not include local NVMe storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the ecs.u1-c1m4.xlarge demonstrates modest performance characteristics, consistently placing in the lower percentiles. CPU performance tests, including stress-ng and Geekbench, categorize both single-core and multi-core execution as weak. Memory bandwidth benchmarks also reflect lower-tier performance, with cached small-block reads reaching 194.05 GB/sec and uncached large-block reads dropping to 25.28 GB/sec. Complex operations, such as multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and image processing, are rated as poor, indicating potential bottlenecks under heavy computational loads.

Given its hardware profile and performance metrics, this server offers a cost-effective solution for resource-dense environments where raw computational speed is not a priority. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent, albeit limited, processing power without the unpredictability of shared-core models. The ecs.u1-c1m4.xlarge is best suited for lightweight workloads such as static web serving, software development environments, basic database operations, and simple utility scripting.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m4.xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring 4 dedicated Intel Xeon cores at 2.5 GHz and 16 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this server lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, utilizing a 2 Gbps baseline network connection. Benchmark results place its CPU and memory performance in the lower tiers, with weak single-core and multi-core scores alongside poor image processing and multi-threaded decompression capabilities. The instance features a 33 MB L3 cache and supports instruction sets such as AVX and AVX512F. Due to its modest performance profile, this instance represents a cost-effective option for resource-dense environments where raw computational speed is not a priority. It is highly suitable for low-intensity workloads, including static web serving, software development environments, basic database operations, and lightweight utility scripting.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m4.xlarge is a general-purpose KVM instance featuring 4 Intel Xeon cores, 16 GB RAM, and a 2 Gbps network baseline, ideal for cost-effective, low-intensity utility workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m4.xlarge is a general-purpose KVM instance with 4 Intel Xeon cores and 16 GB RAM, designed for budget-friendly, light utility workloads.
tagline: A budget-friendly virtual server with balanced memory and dedicated Intel Xeon cores for entry-level utility workloads.
bullet_points: 4 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores running at 2.5 GHz
16 GB of system memory with a balanced 1:4 core-to-RAM ratio
2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Positioned in the lower tier for CPU and memory bandwidth benchmarks
Best suited for light web serving, development, and basic database tasks
